item.title: Capitol Conflicts and Comebacks
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Capitol Conflicts and Comebacks

In Washington, Trump makes a plea,
To tame the Justice Dept’s spree.
While Schumer’s Senate fights,
To keep funds flowing right,
And CFPB’s back with glee.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • In Speech to Justice Dept., Trump Airs Grievances Against His Enemies
  • The Senate votes to avert a shutdown after Schumer relents.
  • Left for Dead, the C.F.P.B. Inches Back to Life

item.title: Rebels and Resolutions
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Rebels and Resolutions

Congress avoided a shutdown so dire,
As Trump’s plans went up in a fire.
Rebels in red
Defied what he said,
Keeping the budget from the quagmire.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Congress Approves Spending Extension, Ending Shutdown Crisis
  • Trump Wanted Shutdown to Happen on Biden’s Watch, Not His
  • Meet the 38 Republicans Who Defied Trump on the Spending and Debt Deal

item.title: Shutdown Showdown
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Shutdown Showdown

In Congress, a shutdown looms large,
With Trump and Musk both taking charge.
The workers despair,
While flights are a scare—
The government can’t seem to barge!

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Here’s What Could Happen in a Government Shutdown
  • The Shutdown Crisis Leads to Questions About Who Is in Charge
  • What a Shutdown Could Look Like, and a ‘Healthy’ Food Fight

item.title: A Spending Deal Decline
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

A Spending Deal Decline

There once was a deal on the line,
‘Til Trump said, “It’s not worth a dime!”
With Musk egging on,
The compromise was gone,
Now shutdown fears grow like a vine.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump, Egged On by Musk, Condemns Spending Deal, Raising Fears of Government Shutdown
  • Trump Pans Spending Deal With Government Shutdown Looming
  • Where Does a ‘Remarkable’ U.S. Economy Go From Here?
